changes: Rewrite from accordion multi-player layout to single-player full-screen view matching the UI kit AvaliarAlunoScreen. Header: back chevron + Avatar + player name + context label (teamName). Body: Fundamentos tecnicos section with Scale5 per skill inside a white card with dividers, change badges (up/down from base), hint text below. Engajamento do dia section with Scale5, expandable soft skills sub-section. Observacao textarea. Bottom dock with Salvar (secondary) + Salvar e proximo (primary) buttons, or single Salvar avaliacao when no next unsaved player. Navigation between players via currentIdx state. All hooks, data flow, mutations preserved from original.
